description_long: This trash bin features a tall, rectangular form with a matte black exterior and a modern, minimalist design. The front and back sides have a large rectangular opening near the top, allowing for easy disposal of waste. The sides are composed of vertical wooden slats, providing both ventilation and a decorative accent that contrasts with the solid black surfaces. The top is flat and solid, with no visible lid or cover, and the interior appears hollow, likely to accommodate a removable liner or bag. The bin's structure suggests it is designed for public urban spaces, combining durability with aesthetic appeal. There are no visible wheels or external signage, and the only handle is an integrated cutout at the top of the front and back openings.
description: A tall, rectangular trash bin with a matte black finish, vertical wooden slats on the sides, and large rectangular openings on the front and back. The design is modern and suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows a solid black surface with a large rectangular opening near the top, serving as the main waste disposal slot.
description_view_1: Side view reveals vertical wooden slats running the full height of the bin, providing a decorative and ventilated appearance.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with a matching rectangular opening and solid black surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again displays the vertical wooden slats, identical to the other side.
attribute_handle_design: integrated handle cutout at top front and back
